title: podolepis lessonii
intro: Podolepis lessonii, also known as the grey copperwheat, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a useful remedy for colds and flu. The grey copperwheat can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
